title: Smoky French Fish Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful fish stew made with smoky and french ingredients. Serve with crusty bread for a delicious meal.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Wrap the smoky bacon slices around the fish fillets and bake for 12 minutes.
In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the diced smoky bacon and cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the French white wine and stir to deglaze the pot.
Add the fish stock, tomato paste, and thyme sprig. Stir to combine.
Add the baked fish fillets to the pot and simmer for 8 minutes.
Serve the fish stew hot, garnished with fresh thyme and crusty bread on the side.
